title: EndlessMine
description: Adds a resource-gathering dimension to Minecraft, giving players unlimited space to gather resources without destroying the Overworld.
body:
_Hello, everyone. First of all, I strongly recommend that you download projects through the official curseforge and modrinth launchers—this will increase the reward for the creators. Thank you all very much for your support!!!_

[![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.gg/s8vZR4PGr2)   [![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/iyouroverlord!) [![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b47082063c60d519ee5fd5b194cc1b85bc1a976d.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/IYourOverlord)[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a51142c3cb736fe0310203307c1221610885d03c.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=E7U2TQU7QAVJN)

_Tired of huge pits, ruined landscapes, and chaotic quarries around your spawn point? MineRealms presents a dedicated mining world, designed specifically for large-scale resource gathering while keeping your main world clean and pristine._

**The portal, located at point 1~1, leads to an entirely separate dimension with custom world generation, featuring a central flat biome and massive rings of biomes expanding outward. The order of the outer biomes changes depending on the world seed, making each server unique while maintaining a predictable and controllable starting zone.

The mining world is optimized for performance and stability: no buildings, caves, natural fluids, or unwanted debris in the world—only a clean environment designed for mining. Player-placed fluids behave normally, and the core gameplay mechanics remain unchanged, ensuring full compatibility with technical and automated mods.

The surface height has been increased for deeper vertical progression, and the entire system is modular and customizable for server administrators.

MineRealms isn't just another dimension; it's a scalable, server-friendly infrastructure solution for organized survival worlds. Preserve the beauty of the Overworld. Move your industry elsewhere.
Starting with version 1.0.10 Now supports Create train designs for versions 5 and 6.  **
